channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: England's Challenges in High-Altitude Match Against Mexico at the World Cup 2026
item.description: The article discusses England's anticipated difficulties in their World Cup 2026 match against Mexico at the Azteca stadium, which sits at 2,200m above sea level. It highlights the physical and tactic...

item.title: Alberta's political showdown at Calgary Stampede amid referendum and pipeline debates
item.description: The Calgary Stampede 2026 has become a political battleground as Alberta faces a looming referendum on its future within Canada and a multibillion-dollar pipeline bid. Premier Danielle Smith and Prime...

item.title: Federal Officials Declare Trump's July 4 Celebration 'Well-Prepared' Amid Heat Wave and Hospitalizations
item.description: Federal agencies described President Donald Trump's July 4 celebration at the Great American State Fair as 'safe' and 'well-prepared' despite extreme weather conditions. The event, part of the 250th a...

item.title: US Ambassador Meets Afrikaner Leaders as Tensions Rise Between US and South Africa
item.description: US Ambassador Brent Bozell has met with prominent Afrikaner leaders in Pretoria, including representatives from AfriForum, Solidarity, and the Freedom Front Plus, amid escalating tensions between the ...

item.title: ABS-CBN Newsletter: Your Source for Latest News and Updates
item.description: The article introduces the ABS-CBN Newsletter as a comprehensive platform offering the latest news, entertainment highlights, exclusive interviews, and updates on popular Kapamilya stars. It emphasize...

item.title: Tanzanian Football Club Yanga Fined 100 Million Shillings for Unauthorized Stadium Use
item.description: Tanzanian football giants Yanga SC have been fined 100 million Tanzanian shillings for unauthorized use of the Benjamin Mkapa Stadium, despite winning the 2025/26 NBC Premier League title. The penalty...

item.title: Andy Burnham Commits to 2024 Manifesto Amid Leadership Race
item.description: Andy Burnham, the newly elected Labour MP for Makerfield and sole candidate to replace Sir Keir Starmer as Labour leader, has ruled out calling an early general election if he becomes prime minister. ...

item.title: AI-Driven Attacks Pose New Cybersecurity Challenges
item.description: The article discusses the growing threat of AI-powered cyberattacks, emphasizing their ability to bypass traditional security measures and exploit human vulnerabilities. It highlights the need for rob...

item.title: Trump's July 4 Celebrations Face Challenges with Heat, Hail, and Logistical Issues
item.description: President Donald Trump's plans for America's 250th anniversary celebrations have faced numerous setbacks, including the sudden shutdown of his state fair in Washington, D.C., due to extreme heat. The ...

item.title: Feroz Khan implicated in SAPS procurement scandals involving tobacco tycoon Sayed
item.description: The Madlanga Commission has uncovered WhatsApp conversations between suspended SAPS crime intelligence deputy head Maj-Gen Feroz Khan and tobacco businessman Mohamed 'Mo' Sayed, revealing their involv...

item.title: New England Patriots Coach Mike Vrabel and Wife Attend Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce Wedding
item.description: The article discusses the public appearance of New England Patriots head coach Mike Vrabel and his wife, Jen, at the wedding of NFL star Travis Kelce and pop singer Taylor Swift. Vrabel, who recently ...

item.title: Top Australian Books of July: A Curated List of Fiction, Memoirs, and Nonfiction Releases
item.description: The article highlights a selection of highly anticipated Australian books set for release in July 2026, curated by Guardian Australia editors and critics. Key titles include 'Worry Doll' by Laura McPh...

item.title: Two Brothers Charged with Land Fraud
item.description: Two brothers, Cypril Nwalaezi and Smart Nwalaezi, were arraigned by the Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) in Port Harcourt for alleged land fraud. The case involves charges of conspiracy...

item.title: Mother and Daughter Found Safe After Being Lost on Southern California Trail
item.description: A mother and daughter, Krystal Meyers, 42, and her daughter Alexis Meyers Martinez, 21, were reported missing after hiking on the Vivian Creek Trail in the San Gorgonio Wilderness area of the San Bern...

item.title: SaskTel Centre's History and Potential Downtown Move
item.description: The SaskTel Centre, a prominent venue in Saskatoon, nearly relocated to the downtown area before its current location was finalized. The article details the complex negotiations and community discussi...

item.title: Maharashtra court remands Ketan Agarwal murder accused to judicial custody
item.description: The Maharashtra Vadgaon Maval court on July 3, 2026, remanded accused Siya Goyal and Chetan Chaudhary to 14 days of judicial custody in the Ketan Agarwal murder case, rejecting the police's request fo...

item.title: Analyzing Unemployment Metrics and Economic Health
item.description: The article critically examines the limitations of using the official unemployment rate as a measure of economic health. It highlights how the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) tracks multiple metrics,...

item.title: Palace Confirms Ongoing Investigation into Zaldy Co's Corruption Case
item.description: The Philippine Palace has stated that authorities are still actively pursuing the graft case against Zaldy Co, a prominent business entity linked to allegations of corruption. The case, which involves...

item.title: Egypt advances to World Cup round of 16 after penalty shootout victory over Australia
item.description: Egypt secured a hard-fought 4-2 penalty shootout victory over Australia in their FIFA World Cup 2026 round of 16 clash, following a 1-1 draw after extra time. The match, held at Dallas Stadium, saw bo...

item.title: Government asks Apple and Google to remove apps causing e-rickshaw issues
item.description: The Indian government has directed Apple and Google to remove at least seven mobile apps that can remotely disable battery-operated e-rickshaws. These apps, including BAT-BMS, Lossigy, and Epoch-i-ion...
